narrative: Strait of Hormuz closure fears drive crude toward $100, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as USD/JPY firms to 157.73; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite hawkish BoJ Summary of Opinions. JPY remains the G8 laggard (-0.675% avg) while gold eases -0.04%; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.22%; VIX 18.4. Watch US CPI tomorrow for Fed repricing risk.
